title: Prehistoric stuff
description:
¡A mod that plans add prehistoric creatures!

Created by slendygato

3D modeler GhostyWeb2099

Puffersaur created originally by xndARTSREAL
body:
A mod that plans to add vanilla prehistoric creatures to minecraft! YOU WILL NEED GECKOLIB AND NEOFORGE 1.21.1. New updates in the future loaded with content will come soon. For now what we have is:

The nautilus, a mob that spawns in all the deep oceans and lush caves, leaving you its shell when it dies.
A new nautilus helmet that you can make with 5 nautilus shells, a turtle helmet and a conduit. Although it may seem expensive, it will be useful for marine explorations.
-The potion of the gift of the nautilus, a potion which if you throw at mobs and kill them they will give you nautilus shells. Obtained with a nautilus and an apnea potion. It has all its variations.

-6 achievements that you can achieve by doing the mod challenges!

-The beach mangrove biome

-New mangrove grasses, both normal and sandy.

-The ancestral burrow, the new structure

-The puffersaurus egg, which when placed will make this new mob appear

-When you right click on the globosaur with scissors, it will give you its scales.

-With the puffersaurus scales you can make the ancient spear, which will allow you to poison and kill mobs.

Explore this colossal innovation with the new mobs and added mechanics!

- A new mob, the Woolly Mouse, will appear in cold biomes. Tame it with pumpkin seeds to follow you everywhere!

- New Dire Wolf Tooth Fossils. You can find them in the rocks of the Old growth pine and spruce taigas, attached to the new Fossil Tooth Block.

- Make a Soul Potion with Soul Sand.
  
- Use Soul Potions to make Worg Souls.
  
- Use Worg Souls to right-click a wolf to spawn a Dire Wolf.
  
- Equip the Dire Wolf with Wolf Armor; it will attack mobs for you.
  
- 6 new achievements.
  
- You can now right-click a Nautilus to get its bucket.
